name: HRT_PROFILE_SECTIONS_VL
query: SELECT B.PROFILE_SECTION_ID, B.BUSINESS_GROUP_ID, B.PROFILE_ID, B.SECTION_ID, B.CONTENT_TYPE_ID, TL.DESCRIPTION, B.OBJECT_VERSION_NUMBER, B.CREATED_BY, B.CREATION_DATE, B.LAST_UPDATED_BY, B.LAST_UPDATE_DATE, B.LAST_UPDATE_LOGIN FROM HRT_PROFILE_SECTIONS_B B, HRT_PROFILE_SECTIONS_TL TL WHERE B.PROFILE_SECTION_ID = TL.PROFILE_SECTION_ID AND B.BUSINESS_GROUP_ID = TL.BUSINESS_GROUP_ID AND TL.LANGUAGE = USERENV('LANG')
